violations.text: The floors are constructed of cement in the kitchen which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Establishment to construct floors to be durable, easily cleanable, and non absorbent. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The sauté unit was observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrective action - TCS food items - Risotto 47 DF, Fish 47 DF, Cheese 47 DF, Pasta 47 DF, Shrimp 47 DF. were voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Knife was observed stored between equipment. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the salad prep unit. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025

The floors are constructed of cement in the kitchen which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Establishment to construct floors to be durable, easily cleanable, and non absorbent New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The floors are constructed of cement in the kitchen which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Establishment to construct floors to be durable, easily cleanable, and non absorbent New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The walk in cooler was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Corrective Action - the walk in cooler was placed out of order, all food items were voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024

Establishment was using Reduced Oxygen Packaging for soups, chili, and sauces. Establishment has not submitted an application for special processing methods. Food items were voluntarily disposed of. Establishment is to stop using ROP until approval has been given from RIDOH. Food items voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024

The floors are constructed of cement in the kitchen which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Establishment is to develop a plan for floor renovation to discuss with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024

The door to the outside, located in the (middle room) and door in back kitchen were observed not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023

Flooring was observed in poor repair. Exposed concrete was observed. All kitchen flooring shall be repaired. Flooring in Walk-in #1 (middle room) was observed buckling and in poor repair. Floor in Walk-in shall be repaired. Flooring shall be constructed with a material that is non-absorbent, smooth, durable and easily cleanable. Coving shall be added to entire kitchen and food prep/storage areas. Small Middle room shall have a celling installed. No food shall be prepared in this space till celling is complete. All exposed wood shall be covered with a material that is non-absorbent, smooth, durable and easily cleanable. Establishment is to contact inspector once physical facilities had been corrected. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2023
